phrases.en: We found out where and when the movie was showing.
phrases.zh: 我们查到了电影在哪里、什么时候放映。

phrases.en: We bought tickets at the box office.
And some popcorn at the snack counter.
phrases.zh: 还在小吃柜台买了爆米花。

phrases.en: The ticket-taker tore our tickets and gave us back the stubs.
phrases.zh: 检票员撕了我们的票，把票根还给了我们。

phrases.en: We watched previews of coming attractions.
phrases.zh: 我们观看了即将上映影片的预告。

phrases.en: Then, we saw the main feature.
At the end, we watched the credits.
phrases.zh: 结束时，我们看了片尾字幕。
